Get default key parameters for diagnostics

Source: R/parameter_registry.R
get_key_parameters.Rd

Returns the Stan parameter names that are typically of interest for MCMC diagnostics and model summaries. When available is provided, also includes all indexed beta[i] and gamma[i] parameters found in the available set (useful when models have multiple covariates).

Usage

get_key_parameters(available = NULL)

Arguments

available

Optional character vector of available parameter names from a fitted model. When provided, all beta[i] and gamma[i] parameters are included.

Value

Character vector of Stan parameter names
